headline: Marathon Petroleum (MPC) Joins Russell Growth Indexes, Is The Upside Already Priced In?
summary: Marathon Petroleum (MPC) has drawn fresh attention after being added to multiple Russell growth benchmarks, a change that could influence how index funds and growth-oriented portfolios gain exposure to the stock. See our latest analysis for Marathon Petroleum. The latest index additions come after a period of strong momentum for Marathon Petroleum, with a 1 day share price return of 5.39% and a 90 day share price return of 25.57%. The 5 year total shareholder return of 473.36% highlights how...
